text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, it's cute. It feels so nice, it must be made
of pretty good fabric.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The clothes are well-sewn—it shows their respect
for the original model.
choice_data_list: It's such a well made plushie.
It's such a well made plushie.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So true. Getting to actually hold it in my hands, I
get a sense of, like, what the makers were feeling,
or... what they wanted to show.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah. That makes me want to work harder.
